subject: (no subject)
body:
NOw that the top of the hill is at 124 instead of 128, they need direction on where to move the fill.. Simply making more of the top of the hill flat. provides few answers. we can't let miles and jules decide on how to sculpt the land..  EVeryone is waiting for your direction.
